title: Luxury Corporate Office
testimonial: The team understood our brief immediately. What they delivered wasn't just an office — it was a statement. Our clients notice the difference the moment they walk in.
description: A 12,000 sq ft corporate headquarters for a leading investment firm. The project encompassed an executive reception with marble cladding, 6 fully AV-integrated conference rooms, open-plan workstations for 120 employees, a dedicated client boardroom, and a rooftop terrace lounge.
